programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La llegada de Jey a la casa revive pasiones olvidadas en Jacky. Una nueva invitada llega con la intención de sabotear la relación entre Rocío y Santiago, mientras que dos invitadas deciden dejar la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Unas nuevas vacaciones comienza para los de Shore y en esta ocasión Mazatlán será testigo de las fiestas, amores, desamores y peleas de la familia más disfuncional de la televisión.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Nacha y Mane se enfrentan a Dania al ver que le tira sus cosas al agua. Los mariscos llegan para la cruda y la ida a un bar termina en una fiesta en la casa. Mane molesta a Dania y un nuevo enfrentamiento entre ellas comienza a gestarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una nueva integrante llega a la casa. La boss anuncia que tienen que trabajar para ser parte del carnaval. El team tendo insiste en que Jey se lleve a la cama a Nacha y un bar es el sitio de encuentros y desencuentros de la familia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Tadeo recibe una sorpresa y los shore se conmueven con su reacción. La celebración del cumpleaños de Xavier comienza. Chile y Jey tienen problemas de erección y Jawy reta a Chile a un duelo de boxeo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La espera termina y Jey por fin logra cumplirle a Nacha. Celia manda a un grupo a trabajar al acuario. La celebración de Xavier continua y las comadres se escapan del antro, lo que hace que Mane y Jawy terminen peleando.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jawy y Mane continúan. Xavi decide invitar a Pepe para que se quede en la casa. Los Shore comienzan a dudar de Fernanda. Karime busca al notario para que valide su virginidad y Mane y Fernanda terminan en un fuerte enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane y Fernanda se van a los golpes. El conclave decide hacerle un examen a Fernanda para evitar su expulsión. Un partido de fútbol entre los Shore y los Big hippo decidirá el futuro de la casa y Pepe recibe una propuesta de amor eterno.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: After confronting Mane, Dania makes an important decision. The Shores attend a band class where the "Verga Muerta" corrido is officially born. Jawy talks to Fernanda, and Mane is determined to leave Dania alone in the house.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: TV chefs Aldo Zilli and Ching He-Huang do battle around south-eastern England. Aldo plumps for a gold ring despite expert advice, while Ching hopes antiques with an eastern origin will far well at auction in north London.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Two British comedy legends, Ronni Ancona and Jan Ravens, start this Road Trip in the North Yorkshire town of Redcar. Jan gets carried away and spends every penny of her budget. Meanwhile, Ronni gets a kick out of a very kitsch glass boot.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Pop icon and actress Claire Grogan and actor Alex Norton find themselves on an Antiques 'Boat' Trip as they reminisce about childhood trips down the Clyde and see what Stirling castle would've looked like in the 16th century.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Presenters Nicki Chapman and Jules Hudson meet a clog maker who carves shoes by hand and visit the Herefordshire Light Infantry Museum to hear about the regiment's involvement at Gallipoli.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Crooner Tony Christie visits Coalbrookdale, the place where ground-breaking techniques were developed that kick-started the industrial revolution. And pop royalty Jimmy Osmond gets to whizz round the historical race circuit at Donington.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Vocal coaches David and Carrie Grant swap singing for antiques. David visits Cambridge and the birthplace of football, while Carrie learns how Letchworth Garden City sparked a revolution in town design.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Susan Cookson and Suzannne Packer battle it out around the northwest of England. Susan discovers her inner haggler as Suzanne keeps the purse-string very tight as she bids to discover an item with some real age.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Gastronomes Tony Singh and Cyrus Todiwala visit the east coast of Scotland. Tony discovers why one Scottish city was home to many millionaires and Cyrus finds out why Anstruther was a pivotal fishing port in the 19th century.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top wheelchair Paralympians Tanni Grey-Thompson and Jade Jones look for antiques in the northeast of England. Tanni tries her hand at traditional glassmaking and Jade learns about the man who was a design champion of the region.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Journalists John Stapleton and Lynn Faulds Wood are joined by Thomas Plant and Margie Cooper. Lynn and Thomas are knee-deep in antiques while hunting for biscuit tins and Margie tries to convince John some rare lamps will make a profit.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Historians Suzannah Lipscomb and Kate Williams travel from Bletchley to an auction in London. They hear how Mrs. Beeton became the first domestic goddess and why Luton played a critical role in the fashion world when hats were daily wear.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Blue Peter presenters Sarah Greene and Peter Duncan are on the hunt for antiques. An incredible haul of antiques, including chimney pots, Pinocchio and a pair of African fertility figures, go under the gavel at an auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts return to Seaton Delaval Hall in Northumberland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Birmingham University, the team finds the biggest vases ever seen on the show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects featured include an elaborate clock which until recently was used as a doorstop.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit an active air base at Marham in Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Port Sunlight on the Wirral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a second visit to Port Sunlight on the Wirral.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the quadrangle of St Andrews University in Scotland.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts arrive on the North Yorkshire coast at Scarborough.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from inside the Farnborough wind tunnels.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travels to Cornwall, where items include a ring with a grim family story.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Cornwall, the team finds early medical instruments and a rare work by Barbara Hepworth.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: Brown bear mum Blondie and her cubs were last seen fleeing from a pack of wolves. Have they survived? Both the black and polar bear families have trouble with marauding males.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan uses his skills as a wildlife cameraman to gain the trust of a white wolf family; as spring turns to summer, he becomes accepted by the pack, including mother Luna and her three newborn pups.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan reunites with his white wolf family as they try to raise their pups and prepare for winter; he walks with wolves as they hunt lemmings, muskox and hares and encounter a rival pack.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan's travels to the remote Canadian Arctic in search of wolves that have never seen people - wolves that have no fear of humans; using his skills as a wildlife cameraman Gordon begins to gain the trust of a white wolf family.

programme.title: Attenborough's Fabulous Frogs
programme.desc: There are more than five thousand species of frogs and toads on the planet, and they come in all shapes, colors and sizes. from across the natural world.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: It really is a big bad world out there; so what happens if you are the little guy.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Everyone loves giraffes, but we don't know a lot about them; Dr Julian Fennessy starts to reveal their secrets -- the most important being that they are disappearing.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Only one man can swim amongst breaching great white sharks as they hunt.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates this astonishing story of a wild cheetah family, revealing in intimate detail what it takes to turn tiny cubs into accomplished predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: At the jungle animal hospital, a dedicated team nurse their exotic patients back to health and prepare a troop of spider monkeys and a flock of scarlet macaws for their release.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Orphaned baby rhinos in South Africa; how the deadly predators are tracked; what can be done to save the species from being poached to extinction.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Setting sail to the island of Bali, Steve and the team are out to find the elusive ocean sunfish; these deep ocean giants feed on poisonous jellyfish and ascend to the shallows for a spa session at a cleaner fish station.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to the Loango National Park on the western coast of Gabon and home to some deadly predators.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve heads to Norway to dive with the planet's ultimate predator: the orca; he also witnesses the northern lights and gets up close to the mighty mouth of a humpback whale.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve starts his South African adventure in one of the weirdest places he's ever gone looking for animals: a power station, in the dark. He stakes out the location for a wild cat that has so far eluded the Deadly 60, the serval.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick lands in the town that gave the world tequila and the metropolis that birthed mariachis and dishes like chilli con carne.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Road to Mexico
programme.desc: Rick Stein visits the Mexican capital to sample the Aztec cuisine.

programme.title: The Naked Chef
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes roast leg of lamb with rosemary, thyme, garlic and panchetta.

programme.title: The Naked Chef
programme.desc: Herbed bread, baked salmon with basil aioli, lemon lime cream tart.

programme.title: The Naked Chef
programme.desc: Spaghetti with fried bread crumbs; potato ravioli.

programme.title: The Naked Chef
programme.desc: Thai green curry; tomato and cucumber salad.

programme.title: The Naked Chef
programme.desc: Jamie prepares food for his 24th birthday party.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers' Cook Off
programme.desc: Eastenders" actress Samantha Womack plates up her recipe for spag bol, while the bikers serve up a Middle Eastern spinach and feta fatayer; the seven-minute supper is chargrilled squid with chorizo and borlotti beans.

programme.title: The Naked Chef

programme.desc: Kekoa, Dawn and Allie reexamine their femininity. Jason rehearses a love scene with a sexy actress. JD tries to rebound from his breakup with Jessie.

programme.desc: Bellator brings the fight action from Newcastle, UK, as two newly inked superstars make their Bellator debuts. Both Valérie Létourneau and Michael McDonald will look for statement wins in the Bellator cage as they aim to send a message to their rivals.

programme.title: Bellator 192: Rampage vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes over The Forum with a highly anticipated showdown between “The American Gangster” Chael Sonnen and Rampage Jackson. Also, Douglas Lima and Rory MacDonald clash for the welterweight belt and Michael Chandler collides with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Pechanga Resort and Casino with a contender showdown as Lorenz Larkin takes on Fernando Gonzalez. Plus Saad Awad looks to keep his hot streak alive against J .J. Ambrose. And AJ Matthews goes to war when he faces Kendall Grove!

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Budapest with a lightweight showdown between Benson Henderson and Roger Huerta. Also on the card, heavy-handed wrestling phenom Ed Ruth and Bellator Kickboxing Champ Denise Kielholtz return to MMA.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in St. Louis, MO with a barnburner main event as former lightweight champ Michael Chandler takes on Brandon Girtz. Also on the card, undefeated phenom, AJ McKee puts his record on the line when he meets Justin Lawrence.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Christina, Jim & daughter Tara. She says she's worried her daughter is in a toxic situation with dad Jim & his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Meet the new wife & find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shelby wants to find the truth about her dad's online relationship with a woman he's never met. Dad David says "Maria" has a $10 million inheritance and says he knows for a fact that "Maria" is a real person and he can't wait to introduce her one day.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer believes she & Russian Pres. Vladimir Putin are in love; the Lord has revealed she will be Putin's wife, the Mother of Russia, & birth him a child. Family syas Jen feels she's intercepted Trump's assassination attemp, terrorist plots, and 4 wars.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Valentine's Day! Dr. Phil tackles romance dilemmas. Can't cook, don't know how to dress sexily, never buy the right gift, or have problems getting your groove on in the love department? Dr. Phil has solutions!Plus learn what men really want!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jodi Arias killed her ex-boyfriend Travis Alexander in 2008. He was stabbed more than 24 times, had his throat slit & was shot in the head. Behind-the-scenes trial details from prosecutor Juan Martinez & a juror & Travis's sister Tanisha speaks out.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Warren Jeffs, leader of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter Day Saints & self-proclaimed prophet, was on the FBI's 10 Most Wanted Fugitives for unlawful flight & sexual conduct with a minor. Dr. Phil talks with FLDS member Willie Jessop.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with husband and wife, Nathan and April, who claim a woman named Ashley is fixated on their beautiful twin daughters and continuously posts pictures of them online, posing as their mother! How will Ashley react when confronted? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says she's fed up with husband Jason's, mom, Kathy. Angie says her mother-in-law is rude, judgmental & meddles. Kathy says Angie is a liar & cheater & she's responsible for all the drama. Can Dr. Phil help these in-laws put years of animosity aside?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when a parent's agenda becomes so extreme that his or her children are forced to live a harsh, stoic existence?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: New details of Rebecca Zahau's death: Was the scene staged to deceive police it was suicide? Renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Cyril Wecht reveals his findings to the family after examining Rebecca's exhumed remains. Does he think foul play was involved?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Blake, 26, is a college graduate and on the dean's list with a 3.5 GPA. He has thrown it away to sit around and smoke pot in the rent-free house his mom supplied. He has aspirations, like stripping off his shirt to show off his self-professed buff body.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2014, former live-in nanny Diane Stretton made headlines when she refused to move out of Marcella Bracamonte's home. The women come face-to-face on Dr. Phil's stage. Who's the victim in this mother vs. nanny feud?

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Constance Wu gets candid with Drew about her radical honesty in her new collection of personal essays "Making A Scene," discussing everything from her mental health battle, sexual harassment and so much more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The most followed family on TikTok and stars of "The D'Amelio Show," Charli, Dixie, Heidi and Marc D'Amelio reveal what it's like sharing their life with over 224 million people around the world.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

When Mary reluctantly agrees to partner with Sandra in the pillow-making business, she finds herself doing all the work--with Sandra reaping all the 'benefits.'

Lester turns into a real pain for Mary when he comes home from work early complaining of a stomach ache, but when she sneaks out for a pedicure, Lester is stricken with appendicitis--leaving Sandra to care for him.

Alarmed that her biological clock is winding down, Sandra sets out to find a perfect husband to father her child, but when she strikes out with the available men, she decides to have a baby anyway--regardless of her marital status.

programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a test of faith, Mac Taylor assigns Detectives Danny Messer and Aiden Burn to one of the CSI team’s toughest cases yet.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A Chinatown robbery goes south when one security guard is killed and the other mistakenly fires shots at a gas tank, burning two of the robbers alive.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Panic ensues at the New York Mercantile Exchange when a briefcase is left behind, it is traced back to a stockbroker who mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a mounted New York City police officer is shot off his horse, Detective Mac Taylor and the team comb the city for suspects.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The electrocution of a young man on the third rail of the subway leads into the world of an extreme sport where taking risks is part of the game.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Competitive dog owners become the prime suspects in a murder investigation when Detective Mac Taylor examines the death of a dog trainer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover the body of a teenaged boy crammed into a 2’ x 2’ x 2’ box buried in the sand at Coney Island.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Mac Taylor and Danny Messer find themselves on the trail of an elusive killer when an expectant bride drops dead on her wedding day.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating a truck-jacking, Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera uncover a body pancaked underneath ten tons of steel.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When young gang members murder the owner of an upscale Bronx wine store, the CSIs must work to find evidence that ties someone to the crime.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A celebration for the release of a report on police corruption ends in bloodshed, when shots ring out on the 65th floor of a Midtown high rise.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera discover a dead woman among the dirty sheets at an industrial laundry facility.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The home invasion murder of a college student sends Detectives on the trail of China White, uncut heroin that has fallen into the wrong hands.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Intercepción (S8 Ep8)
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga el asesinato de un juez, Jo se encuentra cara a cara con un criminal de su pasado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: 48 horas antes (S8 Ep9)
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo importante aparece muerto, Jo se ve envuelta en la peligrosa investigación del presunto violador que liberaron cuando ella trabajaba en Washington D.C.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Sin rastro alguno (S8 Ep10)
programme.desc: Un cuerpo carbonizado se convierte en un desastre para el equipo de CSI cuando comienza a parecer que un luchador de artes marciales mixtas ha sido asesinado por su acosador.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¿Quién está ahí? (S8 E11)
programme.desc: Una investigación de violación de domicilio se vuelve más complicada cuando la familia de la víctima resulta ser menos perfecta de lo que parecía originalmente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Brooklyn hasta la muerte (S8 E12)
programme.desc: Un juego de rol se vuelve letal cuando un jugador es víctima de un asesino auténtico y el otro es secuestrado para pedir un rescate.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El efecto dominó (S8 Ep13)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga dos muertes aparentemente sin relación, sus rastros separados de evidencias conducen a una conclusión que sorprendentemente las vincula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Fin del juego (S8 Ep14)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se encuentra inmerso en el mundo de los videojuegos competitivos cuando descubre que un asesinato puede estar relacionado con un torneo de altas apuestas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Caso cerrado (S8 Ep15)
programme.desc: Asesinan a un técnico de laboratorio en un caso que se parece a otro sin resolver de la década de 1950, el equipo de CSI vislumbra lo que sucede en las sombras del laboratorio.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Salud (S8 Ep16)
programme.desc: Una ola de brutalidad amenaza a una pequeña comunidad de la ciudad de Nueva York cuando encuentran un cuerpo descuartizado y estratégicamente abandonado en cuatro esquinas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Obsequio de cumpleaños (S8 Ep17)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI a un proyecto de viviendas en Brooklyn para investigar el asesinato de un exitoso empresario que se sintió atraído por su antiguo vecindario.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cerca de la muerte (S8 Ep18)
programme.desc: Cuando Mac recibe un disparo, se encuentra en el limbo entre la vida y la muerte, mientras lucha por su vida, su equipo debe llevar al tirador ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Reavivó (S9 Ep1)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando un jefe de bomberos, amigo de Mac, muere en un incendio provocado con la técnica que usó un pirómano recientemente liberado bajo palabra.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Donde hubo fuego… (S9 Ep2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se apresura para detener al pirómano en serie Leonard Brooks después de que empieza a usar el fuego contra personas de su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Adelay es un pelotero que logró salir de Cuba para jugar en las Grandes Ligas, pero está lesionado. Además, Juan Carlos descubrió que su hijo se masturba con fotografías de Evelyn, su esposa.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La hija de Yunaida salió con un novio que tiene antecedentes penales y fingieron un secuestro. La esposa de Carlos vino a Estados Unidos y le anunció que su hijo había muerto, pero era falso.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jennifer trajo a su hija de Cuba, pero la joven no piensa ayudarla económicamente con la casa. Por otro lado, Roberto preparó y costeó la boda de la hija de su esposa, ya no quiere pagar.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Rosa sufrió una golpiza en su casa, los atacantes buscaban droga que su hermana había escondido. Bianca tiene una fundación para ayudar gente sin recursos, pero está lucrando bajo esa fachada.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Obligado por las circunstancias, un padre se tiene que separar de su hijo. Además, Andrea demanda a los padres de la niña que alquiló y exige que le devuelvan el dinero del depósito.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Yuri, la empleada doméstica, jugaba con el niño de la casa hasta que fue secuestrado por error. También, Lázaro es muy popular en las redes por las cadenas de oro, pero son falsas.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: María y Ricardo no se ponen de acuerdo en cómo educar a su hijo, ella es más recta, mientras él es permisivo. También, Angie y Violeta corren carreras de autos y tienen diferencias.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Santa visitó un club en México con su esposo y comprobó que las bailarinas eran menores de edad. También, Liz ha invertido mucho dinero en la carrera de medicina de su hija, quien abandonó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: La sobrina de Jazmín fue adoctrinada por el Estado Islámico en Siria. En otro caso, Alberto perdió su empresa de tours con delfines como terapia, dice que Eugenia es la culpable.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Marcos y Gabriela contratan un vientre de alquiler, pero notan que la gestora de la criatura no está bien de salud. Luis se casa con Edith para que lo reclame legalmente, pero ella se demora.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Se casaron, él la trajo a Miami y descubrió que estaba embarazada pero no de él. En otro caso, el hijo de Julia metió el pene en un camping gas para que la novia le hiciera sexo oral.

programme.desc: Donny drops the lawsuit against Frasier and Daphne because he's met another woman who he has decides to marry. Frasier dates his lawyer Abbey but accuses her of overcharging him for legal expenses.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier betrays Roz by staying friends with her cheating ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier reluctantly co-hosts Seattle's Christmas parade with his radio rival.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is awarded with the Lifetime Achievement Award. Martin, his father accepts on his behalf because Frasier is off analyzing his own life with old Harvard mentor, Professor Tewsbury.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier decides that three generations of Crane men should head out to the woods for some family bonding, despite their protests.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles go back to school to learn about auto mechanics.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles try to revitalize the career of their boyhood Shakespearean actor/idol only to learn that he stinks.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A man in the bar becomes sick of Cliff's obnoxious know-it-all behavior and challenges him to a fight. Will Cliff shut up, accept the challenge, or run away?

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach brings fortunes to Cheers when he buys an antique scale.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane forbids Sam to go on an annual ski trip with his buddies.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach is hurt when he learns that his deceased friend once propositioned his wife.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norm tries to prove his manliness when his new client makes advances.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam hires a brilliant artist to paint Diane as a peace offering.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane defends her relationship with Sam to a slandering artist.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their explosive separation, Sam has fallen off the wagon with a thud and has returned to his playboy ways, while Diane has just returned from a self-imposed rest at Golden Brook Sanitarium.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: After several sessions with Dr. Frasier Crane, Sam is getting his life back in order, so Diane feels it's time to tell him the truth about her relationship with the psychiatrist.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam gloats when he has reason to believe that Diane is still in love with him.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier asks Sam to escort Diane to an event while he is out of town.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam reaps the consequences of getting involved with a married woman.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Cheers' bartender Woody Boyd overstays his welcome when he visits Seattle.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Valentine's Day finds Niles, Frasier, Martin and Daphne on three very different kinds of dates.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles hires an aggressive new divorce lawyer who may wind up exposing his long-running crush on Daphne.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila. Sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre al que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: Pecado de juventud
programme.desc: Una sirvienta embarazada del joven de la casa donde trabaja es despedida de su trabajo y un vecino abogado le ofrece su ayuda para hacer que el joven se comprometa con ella, o al menos darle una ayuda para criar a su hijo.

programme.title: Al Fin a Solas
programme.desc: Víctor se casa con Julia y esta ansioso por disfrutar su noche de bodas. Juntos vivirán las más inesperadas y cómicas experiencias que le dejará una tormentosa y frustrada pasión.

programme.title: Espaldas Mojadas
programme.desc: Huyendo de la justicia, Rafael logra cruzar la frontera ayudado por Frank. En Estados Unidos, Rafael vive en constante zozobra, sin lograr adaptarse al estilo de vida americano y añorando con nostalgia su vida en México.

programme.title: Novias Impacientes
programme.desc: Tres hombres y tres mujeres son los protagonistas de esta divertidísima comedia romántica. Lo que empieza como una broma inocente, será el preámbulo para una historia llena de risas y novias impacientes.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: Philip Seymour Hoffman nos ofrece una actuación ganadora del Oscar® (2006, Mejor Actor) como Truman Capote, el cual se embarca en un viaje para investigar el asesinato de la familia Clutter en Kansas, lo que se convertirá en su libro más reconocido.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: Acquitted by Faith
programme.desc: El abogado, Benjamin Stills, está a punto de ser sentenciado a prisión y encuentra fe en Dios después de que una adolescente pierde su vida en un accidente automovilístico por enviar mensajes de texto mientras conducía.

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: El inicio de la carrera de Wild Bill Hickock como un legendario hombre de leyes y culmina en su reubicación en Deadwood, donde se produce el reencuentro con Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Las cuatro plumas
programme.desc: Harry Feversham es un soldado con gran futuro hasta que renuncia a su regimiento. Es tachado de cobarde, repudiado por su familia, su prometida y su mejor amigo. Tras saber que su regimiento ha sido atacado, se embarca en una travesía de redención.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: Hermosas chicas
programme.desc: La reunión de diez años de la secundaria genera sorpresas para un grupo de amigos. Los chicos declaran que están listos para ir de fiesta con las "chicas hermosas", pero en realidad, siguen teniendo dificultades para descifrar al sexo opuesto.

programme.title: Sobreviviendo
programme.desc: Son cinco años después y Tony Manero sigue ardiendo. Ahora se pavonea hacia un desafío aún mayor, hacerlo como un bailarín en el escenario de Broadway.

programme.title: El sabor del amor
programme.desc: Alice, una joven y talentosa sous chef del mejor restaurante de Nueva York, recibe una invitación para ser jueza de un concurso de comida para una prestigiosa recaudación de fondos anual.

programme.title: Hermosas chicas
programme.desc: La reunión de diez años de la secundaria genera sorpresas para un grupo de amigos. Los chicos declaran que están listos para ir de fiesta con las "chicas hermosas", pero en realidad, siguen teniendo dificultades para descifrar al sexo opuesto.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Highlander III: Dimensión final
programme.desc: En este tercer capítulo de la franquicia de acción trepidante, el inmortal Connor MacLeod está destinado a una batalla decisiva con su despiadado enemigo eterno, Kane.

programme.title: Los Kocainos
programme.desc: Tania, es llamada para un trabajo donde deberá contar una historia que demuestre lo mal que está la gente en el gobierno actual. Su investigación la llevará a conocer el infierno que es vivir en el mundo de las drogas y las pandillas.

programme.title: La Soga
programme.desc: Based on true events in the Dominican Republic, 'La Soga' tells the personal struggle of Luisito, a brave cop, who revolts against his country's immoral government.

programme.title: Lluvia Negra
programme.desc: El ganador del Oscar(r) Michael Douglas y Andy García interpretan a dos policías de Nueva York, cuya misión de escoltar a un asesino de regreso a su Japón natal los lleva a los bajos mundos de Osaka y directamente al centro de una batalla violenta.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: La Novia
programme.desc: Desde pequeños, Leonardo, el novio, y la novia han formado un triángulo inseparable. Sin embargo, las cosas se complican cuando el novio y la novia deciden casarse.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas

programme.title: Cursed

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: Bienvenido a Belko Industries, un tranquilo lugar de trabajo que está a punto de convertirse en un sangriento campo de batalla, cuando 80 empleados son encerrados en su edificio de oficinas y obligados a jugar un juego despiadado de matar o morir.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: Alien: el secuestro
programme.desc: Mientras acampan, Jean y sus tres amigos son abducidos por extraterrestres. Ella recupera la conciencia en un hospital militar de los Estados Unidos especialmente diseñado para rehabilitar a las víctimas de abducciones.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2 (MIRAMAX) ES
programme.desc: Impulsado por whisky barato, avaricia y odio, Willie Soke (Billy Bob Thornton) regresa como "Santa", esta vez para arruinar un evento de beneficencia en Chicago en Navidad. Es una secuela tan divertida y extravagante que supera a la original.

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Gambit

programme.title: Locos por el juego

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles

programme.desc: Kinchloe participates in a camp boxing match to divert attention from Hogan's planned heist.

programme.desc: Burkhalter's niece is getting married and by having LeBeau design her wedding gown, Hogan is going to contact an underground agent, and later free him after capture by the Gestapo.

programme.desc: Dressed in a German uniform for a mission, Carter finds himself serving in the German army.

programme.desc: Hogan has to save Klink when his account books at Stalag 13 aren't quite correct.

programme.desc: Crittendon and Hogan's men try to capture Rommel, "The Desert Fox" and current commander of the Western defenses.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: The Taxi gang falls prey to hilarious fear for homeless Elaine’s romantic well-being when chivalrous Bobby allows her to live in his apartment while he is gone. Unexpectedly, he returns before she has found other quarters

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Wild and crazy theatrics erupt when Tony decides to become an actor and Bobby, as his skeptical agent, is aghast when Tony lands a role because he is the right type.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter's anniversary gift to Maude is an electric organ on which he promises to serenade her -- just as soon as he completes the mail-order instruction course. A few days of Walter's practicing drives the household up the wall.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Walter turns from a benevolent host into Scrooge when he and Maude host a Christmas Eve party for his employees. Walter is shocked when they announce some changes they have in mind for the future. Walter orders them out of his house.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The Arthur-Vivian love affair comes apart at the seams when Vivian begins to resent Arthur's constant eulogizing of his late wife in every conversation. Maude thinks Arthur's romantic memories of his late wife are perfectly natural.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's flawed liberalism bubbles to the surface once more as she decides it would be a lovely gesture to invite a black child from the ghetto to live with them for two weeks.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Should the contents of a man's wallet be 'off-limits' to his wife? Walter definitely thinks so, and when his wallet accidentally falls out of a drawer, Maude can't resist the temptation to peek at its contents.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The last thing in the world Maude Findlay wants for a birthday gift is a surprise party where the men talk only to the men and the women are left together in another corner -- but that's exactly what Walter gives her.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Lionel are planning on attending a demonstration at the United Nations. However, the rally gets out of hand and news of it appears on TV. This worries Gloria who begs Archie to go down there and get Mike.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: A local election has the Bunker family in turmoil as Mike and Gloria are all for Claire Packer, a woman, which is why Archie is dead set against her. However, once down at the voting booths, Archie realizes that he can't vote because he isn't registered.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: At the grocery store, Edith has an accident in the parking lot. She loses control of her shopping cart which smashes into a car and a can of Cling Peaches (in heavy syrup) flies out of the cart, onto the car, and makes a dent.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is all stressed out with upcoming exams leaving him impotent and frustrated. Gloria encourages him to discuss it with her, but he refuses. Gloria confides in Edith what the problem is, and in turn she tells Archie.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The Bunkers are having problems with their furnace which gets Archie entertaining the idea of moving. When an unscrupulous black real-estate salesman, Mr. Byrd, offers Archie a hefty sum of money for his home, Archie is all for it despite Mike's warnings.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar loses money in a poker game and when he can't pay the debt in cash, he donates Felix's band, the Sophisticados, to Billie Joe as payment instead.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: When Oscar learns the park where he and his cronies played baseball is going to be the site for an office building, Oscar becomes civic-minded and decides to run for city councilman.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Singer-composer Paul Williams is the special guest star in this episode written especially for him. Felix Unger's daughter has a crush on Williams and runs away from home to follow him wherever he appears.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sweet's friends, the Tibbits, are an older couple that own a bookshop in Sparta. When Mrs. Tibbits is shot and killed during an apparent robbery, Gillespie and Tibbs question the suspicious circumstances around her death. Was her death planned?

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs is working hard to reunite his family, when he discovers that his aunt's son may be involved in a murder. Virgil is caught between hurting his aunt who loves her son and bringing justice to the town he works to protect every day.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The owner of a local gym in Sparta, Kathleen Wheartly, tries to protect her delinquent brother, Jack, who is falsely accused of murder. She soon finds that her own life is in danger when a ruthless bounty hunter shows up in town, looking for Jack.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: It’s Christmastime and an eager journalist from the local Sparta Herald newspaper begs to interview the police force; however, when she twists their stories to fit her negative agenda, the officers learn a hard lesson about the power of the press.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An abused wife vanishes after a vicious attack by her drunken husband and all clues point to murder with the husband as the prime suspect, but he can't remember if he did it or not.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A drug kingpin guns down a cop. To ensure a conviction, a narcotics officer who witnessed the murder will have to reveal in court a closely guarded personal secret that could cost him friendships and his standing in the department.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A soon-to-retire narcotics cop roughs up a drug pusher and frames him, leading to blackmail and murder. Meanwhile, an investigation into a major drug ring known as the "Tucson connection" unfolds in San Francisco.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A juvenile gang causes trouble in a San Francisco neighborhood, culminating in a robbery that results in a death. Billy Wilson, who claims innocence, faces mounting evidence and a violent past as the judicial system determines his fate.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A college model is fatally slashed while waiting for a bus. A convict, a fellow student, flees when he’s set to board the same bus and is arrested, but lacks a motive. Detective Stone suspects one of the woman's classmates might be the real killer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Tip Ellis, a fellow private investigator and friend of Joe Mannix, is murdered while looking into a case of industrial espionage in Fresno.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix tries to help a nun who took a dying man's confession that he let an innocent man go to prison for murder, but finds the inmate insisting he is guilty.

programme.title: Mannix

programme.title: Yuyu Hakusho

programme.title: Yowamushi Pedal Grande Road
programme.desc: The Inter-high enters its final day; Before the race begins, as each school's tension reaches its peak, Machimiya of Hiroshima Kureminami appears before Sakamichi and his team.

programme.title: Yowamushi Pedal Grande Road
programme.desc: The third day of the Inter-high has finally begun; Sohoku and Hakone Academy cooperate in order to reach the aces who started before them; Hiroshima Kureminami's Machimiya gathers the rear pack and begins cooperating with them as well.

programme.title: Yowamushi Pedal Grande Road
programme.desc: Machimiya's rear pack swallows Sakamichi; Hiroshima Kureminami quickly abandons the pack and uses the energy they conserved to chase after the front.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuando se calma el agua
programme.desc: Un dirigente sindical es ejecutado en su casa poco después de una huelga de los miembros del sindicato. Ni su esposa ni nadie en el vecindario escuchó ningún disparo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Afición al veneno
programme.desc: Tres muertes aparentemente no relacionadas resultaron ser asesinatos en serie. El asesino había tenido cuidado: usó veneno que no tenía sabor ni olor.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los investigadores examinan las cenizas de un incendio que mató a una mujer de 40 años. El fuego parecía haber sido iniciado por un cigarrillo desatendido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue el accidente automovilístico más mortal en la historia de los Estados Unidos. Casi un centenar de vehículos participaron, doce personas murieron y más de cincuenta resultaron heridas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Firme aquí
programme.desc: Una madre de dos hijos desaparece después de salir de compras. Su cuerpo es encontrado un mes después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Es musgo, no grama
programme.desc: Una joven fue encontrada muerta en un campo de golf en las Bahamas. El césped de ese campo era tan distintivo que tenía valor probatorio. La evidencia llevó a la policía a dos sospechosos.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Bloqueo del escritor
programme.desc: Una brillante joven arquitecta se enfermó y murió poco antes de testificar en un juicio penal. La autopsia reveló que había sido envenenada con arsénico.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer de 19 años fue encontrada muerta en su automóvil; la escena se había organizado para que el asesinato pareciera un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres fueron asesinados mientras dormían en sus camas. La noche siguiente, un incendio provocó la destrucción de una clínica de planificación familiar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pura suerte
programme.desc: En 1991, la esposa de un militar fue brutalmente asesinada en Filipinas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Aceitoso en la mañana
programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una noche con vientos en Kansas en 1995, un misterioso incendio arrasó con la casa de un doctor prominente. Entre los escombros, los investigadores encontraron evidencia que les dijo cómo comenzó el incendio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que aparecen 10 cuerpos en Florida, una víctima – Lisa McVey de 17 años de edad – es secuestrada pero liberada. Ella lleva a la policía al autor del crimen, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2005, David Castor sufrió una muerte lenta y agonizante durante varios días. Su esposa Stacey sostuvo que fue un suicidio, a pesar de que se hizo con un anticongelante.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un policía fuera de servicio murió de un disparo, sus colegas oficiales estaban determinados a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de una Convención de Filadelfia, 180 legionarios contraen síntomas similares a la neumonía y 29 de ellos mueren. La determinación de un científico ayuda a identificar la causa de esta enfermedad mortal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que una pelea callejera le quitó la vida a un campeón nacional de lucha libre, la policía tuvo que determinar si fue asesinado a sangre fría o en defensa propia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un joven sano muere misteriosamente mientras duerme y las pruebas de toxicología revelan una dosis letal de lidocaína en su sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When cute and funny Rachel joins Peter, Danny & Derek’s MI group for their “How-To” video project, confidence is high.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is on her A game - she's excelling at work, Andrea's given her a raise, and she’s going to use the money to redesign her bedroom.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy finally gets the news he’s been waiting for – he’s been accepted into NYU! But he’s got other things on his mind. He is slowly discovering that he has other options when it comes to his real dream – walking again.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s world is rocked when Paige drops a bomb – her dad’s going to help her buy a condo. Ellie’s just learned she might be up for the editorship of the Core newspaper, so she’s distracted.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner and Jimmy have just one more exam before they’re finally done school and, with Jimmy's help, Spinner's sure he can pass and enjoy his cancer-free future.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Spinner and Jane have plans for next year – she’ll start pre-law and he’ll attend Police College. When he doesn’t get in, he can’t bear to tell her, so he lies.

programme.desc: Pushed to the edge by Holly J, Alli begins posting nasty things about her on the “anti-Grapevine” blog, the underground school on-line site.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: The mind parasite within the Keller Machine becomes too powerful for the Master to control. It learns how to move on its own and goes on the hunt for new minds.

programme.desc: The Master forms an uneasy alliance with the Doctor so that between them they can subdue the Keller Machine which is now out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Mind of Evil
programme.desc: The Brigadier brings the prison under control, but the Master has escaped and plans to start a world war. The Keller Machine breaks free of the Doctor's restraining device and the Doctor has no choice but to turn the parasite against the Master.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: The Doctor tries to prevent Professor Horner from breaking into an ancient barrow near the village of Devil’s End. Posing as the village vicar, the Master summons dark forces.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: Devil’s End is sealed off from the outside world by a heat barrier. The Doctor and Jo return to the barrow where they are confronted by the gargoyle, Bok.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons
programme.desc: The Doctor attempts to help the Brigadier penetrate the heat barrier but is attacked by the Master’s servant in a helicopter. The Master prepares to summon the Daemon Azal.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Daemons

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in a bleak future where Earth is ruled by the Daleks and mankind is enslaved. Rescuing Jo, the two escape but the brutish Ogrons are in pursuit.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Daleks

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: The work of the committee is hampered by sabotage, fear, and suspicion. The Doctor knows the Ice Warriors of old and believes that they may be the guilty party.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of Peladon
programme.desc: Hepesh, supported by the delegate from Arcturus, is revealed to be behind the attacks. Arcturus is killed but Hepesh escapes to rouse a rebellion against the King.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost, Tommy and Kanan move forward with their task to kill the heads of the Jimenez Cartel; Donovan warns Angela that her own office is after her; LaKeisha lets slip that Teresi is Tommy's father.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: The AUSA turns up the heat on Ghost and implicates his inner circle in on a RICO; Ghost and Tommy plan to frame Dre for the murder of Raymond Jones, Raina's killer; Angela and Tasha enact a plan of their own.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: After their mother is arrested, twins Janelle and Tal are sent to live with their Uncle Al in Atlanta, where Janelle learns about the High Water performing arts school in their new neighborhood.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Forced outsider her comfort zone, Janelle struggles at her High Water audition; Tal confronts his bullies.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Amalia rompe con Rafael al enterarse que es un ladrón por boca de Susana. Teresa Cristina se cuela con Ro en la nueva mansión de Griselda con un plan macabro. Griselda pone a prueba a Iris con la ayuda de José. Esther y Juan Pablo hacen el amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara tiembla porque uno de sus aliados le da la espalda, cuando la noticia que recibe sobre Marisa provoca un giro en sus planes. Oscar no se deja intimidar por la jueza y le recomienda pensar sus acciones. Se vende la primera piedra preciosa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa sospecha quién está detrás del robo de las joyas. Cuando Calixta le dice que tuvo en sus manos las pruebas para ayudarla, ella le cuenta que el Polaco tiene en su poder unas piedras preciosas. Mireya logra que Víctor pueda ir a ver a Lalo.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal y Marisa están juntos y cerca de Lalo, pero ella marca distancia por el bien de su campaña. Oscar ya sabe cómo descubrir a los cómplices del crimen y la policía está muy cerca del socio del Polaco. Marcela vive su historia de amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa le dice a Oscar que decidió no involucrar más a Cristóbal en su caso, mientras Cristóbal está enojado por lo que ella dijo en el programa de televisión. Richard alerta a Calixta sobre la cercanía del Polaco. Lalo dona su cabello.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Bárbara rechaza el dinero de Griselda y elige a su hijo. Kike la echa y ella le roba un beso. Patricia se cae al esquivar la moto de Rafael y podría perder a su bebé. Teresa Cristina y Griselda se unen para rezar. Reinaldo llega y las encuentra así.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Patricia pierde el bebé. Teresa Cristina se alegra, para ella es lo mejor que pudo haber pasado. Máximo se despide de sus fans y revela el carácter mezquino de Bárbara. Los fans la acorralan y quieren lincharla por su codicia y falta de escrúpulos.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Mallory's handsome but shy French tutor, Jeff, finally musters up the nerve to ask her out and then courts disaster by enlisting Alex's advice on how to behave on the date.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: In the hospital awaiting a tonsillectomy, Jennifer fears she may never see her family again.
